_comment: Per-shape schedule for the FlyDSL jagged_dense_bmm BACKWARD (grad_jagged +
Tunables: split (None -> D-derived 2 if D<=256 else 1), coarsen_m (None ->
module default 2), gj_stages_a (None -> heuristic). shape id is
reduction_k == output_n == D (square dense). Resolution: explicit kwarg >
winners exact match > fallback.by_d_bucket (D<=256 -> d_le_256, else
d_gt_256). The only shape-varying win today is gj_stages_a: =1 at D=256
(grad_jagged -2.6% direct / -3.4% autograd) and =2 at D=512 (=1 is
Same JSON on both archs: the backward has no arch-specific atom (the fp16
32x32x8 path was removed), so gfx942 and gfx950 share the schedule.
